description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest with multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) and corresponding Tox sessions. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, set up the respective Python version, install tox-setuptools-version, and run Tox with the session.
